schema_name: Taiwan PDPA Privacy and Cross-Border Review Input Schema
description: Hybrid input schema for policy-based review of Taiwan PDPA collection, processing, use, sensitive personal data, data subject rights, marketing, commissioned processing, security maintenance, breach notification, and cross-border transfer restriction scenarios.

current_region.description: Current region or hosting location where the dataset is stored or processed.

encryption_at_rest.description: Whether encryption at rest is enabled for the target dataset or resource.

contains_article6_sensitive_data.description: Whether the dataset appears to contain Taiwan PDPA Article 6 sensitive data: medical records, healthcare, genetic data, sex life, physical examination, or criminal records.

uses_commissioned_processor.description: Whether a commissioned party, vendor, or hosted service provider collects, processes, or uses personal data on behalf of the agency.

access_control_in_place.description: Whether baseline access control is configured.

dataset_name.description: Human-readable name of the dataset being evaluated.

agency_type.description: Whether the actor is a government agency or non-government agency under Taiwan PDPA.

specific_purpose_defined.description: Whether the specific purpose for collection, processing, and use is clearly defined.

purpose_necessity_review_completed.description: Whether the activity stays within the necessary scope of the specific purpose and has a legitimate and reasonable connection with the collection purpose.

collection_processing_basis.description: Primary Taiwan PDPA basis for collection or processing. Select the value applicable to the agency type and scenario.

contains_article6_sensitive_data.description: Whether Article 6 sensitive categories are involved: medical records, healthcare, genetics, sex life, physical examination, or criminal records.

sensitive_data_exception_basis.description: Article 6 exception basis for sensitive personal data, if applicable.

written_consent_for_sensitive_data.description: Whether written consent is documented for Article 6 sensitive data when relying on the written-consent exception.

consent_freely_given.description: Whether consent appears to be freely given and not contrary to the data subject's will.

consent_proof_available.description: Whether the data collector can prove consent where consent is relied upon.

collected_directly_from_data_subject.description: Whether personal data is collected directly from the data subject.

article8_notice_provided.description: Whether Article 8 notice was provided: agency name, purpose, categories, time period/territory/recipients/methods, rights and exercise method, and impact of non-provision.

article8_notice_exemption_applies.description: Whether an Article 8 notice exemption applies.

indirect_collection_notice_required.description: Whether Article 9 notice is required because data was not provided by the data subject and no exemption applies.

article9_source_notice_provided.description: Whether the source of personal data and required Article 8 items were provided before processing/use or at first use where allowed.

data_subject_rights_request_ready.description: Whether workflows exist to respond to inquiry, review, copy, supplement/correction, cessation, and erasure requests.

rights_deadline_tracking_ready.description: Whether Article 13 deadlines are tracked: 15 days for Article 10 requests and 30 days for Article 11 requests, with allowed extensions and written notice.

data_accuracy_review_completed.description: Whether personal data accuracy, correction, supplementation, and disputed-accuracy controls were reviewed.

retention_period_defined.description: Whether retention period, purpose-expiry deletion, and cessation of processing/use are documented.

use_outside_original_specific_purpose.description: Whether personal data will be used outside the original specific purpose of collection.

outside_purpose_use_basis.description: Basis for use outside the original specific purpose, if applicable.

separate_consent_for_outside_purpose.description: Whether separate consent was obtained after informing the data subject of the other purpose, scope, and impact on rights/interests.

uses_data_for_marketing.description: Whether the non-government agency uses personal data for marketing.

marketing_optout_mechanism_ready.description: Whether opt-out means are provided at first marketing use and objections are honored immediately at the agency's cost.

data_subject_objected_public_source_proc.description: Whether a data subject objected to processing/use of publicly available source data based on an overriding protected interest.

public_source_objection_handled.description: Whether the public-source objection was handled by deleting or ceasing processing/use where appropriate.

breach_notification_process_ready.description: Whether breach fact-finding and data subject notification process is documented for theft, disclosure, alteration, or other infringement due to PDPA violation.

security_maintenance_measures_ready.description: Whether appropriate security and maintenance measures are in place to prevent theft, alteration, damage, destruction, or disclosure.

industry_security_plan_required.description: Whether the competent industry authority requires a security and maintenance plan and business-termination disposal rules for this non-government agency.

industry_security_plan_in_place.description: Whether the required security and maintenance plan and business-termination disposal rules are in place.

uses_commissioned_processor.description: Whether a commissioned party is used to collect, process, or use personal data.

commissioned_processor_terms_in_place.description: Whether written instructions or binding terms cover commissioned processing, security, purpose limits, rights support, return/deletion, and oversight.

target_region.description: Target region or hosting location selected for storage, processing, use, or transfer.

cross_border_transfer.description: Whether the scenario involves cross-border processing or use of personal data under Taiwan PDPA Article 2.

recipient_country_protection_adequate.description: Whether the receiving country or territory has proper personal data protection regulations such that data subject rights are unlikely to be harmed.

major_national_interest_involved.description: Whether the cross-border transfer may involve major national interests.

treaty_or_agreement_restriction_known.description: Whether an international treaty or agreement specially restricts the transfer.

third_country_circumvention_risk.description: Whether the transfer path may route data through a third country or territory to circumvent Taiwan PDPA.

authority_transfer_restriction_applies.description: Whether a competent industry authority restriction, order, or decision applies to the transfer.

target_country.description: Country or territory mapped from target_region.

target_country_known.description: Whether target_region could be mapped to a country or territory.

transfer_outside_taiwan.description: Whether the target country or territory is outside Taiwan.

baseline_security_controls_ready.description: Whether encryption at rest, encryption in transit, and access control are all confirmed.

article21_restriction_risk_present.description: Whether any Article 21 cross-border transfer restriction risk factor is present.

derived_logic.cross_border_transfer: manual cross_border_transfer if provided, otherwise transfer_outside_taiwan
derived_logic.baseline_security_controls_ready: encryption_at_rest == true && encryption_in_transit == true && access_control_in_place == true
derived_logic.article21_restriction_risk_present: major_national_interest_involved == true || treaty_or_agreement_restriction_known == true || recipient_country_protection_adequate == false || third_country_circumvention_risk == true || authority_transfer_restriction_applies == true

validation_notes: If contains_article6_sensitive_data is true, sensitive_data_exception_basis should be supplied.
If sensitive_data_exception_basis is written_consent, written_consent_for_sensitive_data and consent_freely_given should be supplied.
If collected_directly_from_data_subject is false, indirect_collection_notice_required and article9_source_notice_provided should be evaluated.
If use_outside_original_specific_purpose is true, outside_purpose_use_basis should be supplied.
If outside_purpose_use_basis is consent, separate_consent_for_outside_purpose should be supplied.
If cross_border_transfer is true, Article 21 risk factors should be evaluated.
If uses_commissioned_processor is true, commissioned_processor_terms_in_place should be supplied.
